capabilities.name: Project Setup & Configuration
capabilities.description: Create and configure projects with visibility, stages, tags, analytic accounts, and collaboration settings aligned to business requirements.
examples: Create a customer-visible project with portal collaborators
Configure project stages for a software development workflow
Set up analytic accounting for project cost tracking

capabilities.name: Task Lifecycle Management
capabilities.description: Manage full task lifecycle: creation, assignment, priorities, kanban states, deadlines, stage transitions, and activity tracking.
examples: Create a task and assign it to multiple users
Configure blocked/done kanban states
Automate stage-change notifications

capabilities.name: Timesheet Tracking
capabilities.description: Record, validate, and analyze timesheets linked to employees, tasks, and analytic accounts. Support grid entry, timers, and billing.
examples: Log time against a task via grid view
Set up employee-user linkage for timesheets
Generate timesheet reports by project

capabilities.name: Project Planning & Scheduling
capabilities.description: Plan projects with Gantt views, milestones, task dependencies, and deadline management to track progress versus plan.
examples: Build a Gantt schedule with task dependencies
Track milestone completion across projects
Use deadline warnings for overdue tasks

capabilities.name: Resource Allocation
capabilities.description: Assign work to users and teams, balance workloads, and forecast capacity using project_forecast enterprise features.
examples: Balance open tasks across a development team
Forecast consultant capacity for the next quarter
Identify overloaded team members

capabilities.name: Project Profitability
capabilities.description: Analyze project profitability via timesheet costs, invoicing, and margin reporting using sale_timesheet enterprise integration.
examples: Link a project to a sales order for billing
Review project margin report
Configure timesheet product and billing rates

capabilities.name: Visibility & Collaboration
capabilities.description: Configure who can see projects and tasks: portal customers, internal employees, or private followers. Manage project.collaborator records.
examples: Share a project read-only with a portal customer
Restrict a project to internal employees only
Add external stakeholders as collaborators

capabilities.name: Stage Automation & KPIs
capabilities.description: Implement server actions, automated email notifications, SLAs, and dashboard KPIs for project health and burndown tracking.
examples: Send email when task moves to validation stage
Create a burndown chart KPI
Set up SLA deadline tracking

capabilities.name: Project Security Model
capabilities.description: Apply project security groups and record rules to enforce multi-company isolation, private tasks, and visibility restrictions.
examples: Restrict project managers to their own company
Allow employees to see only public projects
Protect private tasks from non-followers
